title: T-018 — Wiring: wo.completed worker consumer → cascade + allocate + close + emit finance.wo_cost.closed (§9.4, §13.1)
prompt:
# T-018 — wo.completed worker handler

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §9.4 triggers (trg_wo_cost_finalize); §13.1 event subscriptions row `wo.completed`; §12.2 event taxonomy `finance.wo_cost.closed`; §11.3 V-FIN-WO-05 close gate + V-FIN-WO-08 24h SLA warn.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Apps/worker handler that subscribes to `production.wo.completed` event from 08-PROD. On consume:
1. Calls `app.recalculate_wo_cost(wo_id)` (T-016 SECURITY DEFINER fn) under finance_worker role.
2. Calls `app.allocate_coproducts(wo_id)` (T-017).
3. Validates V-FIN-WO-05 (all outputs registered) — if fail, retry with backoff up to 24h then move to DLQ.
4. UPDATE work_order_costs SET status='closed', costing_date=now() WHERE wo_id=$1 AND status='open'.
5. Emit finance_outbox_events row event_type='finance.wo_cost.closed' with full breakdown payload (T-027 schema).
6. Emit observability metric `wo_cost_finalize_duration_seconds` (Prometheus per §15.5).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/worker/src/finance/wo-completed-handler.ts`:
   - Consumer signature `handleWoCompleted(event)`.
   - Idempotency: check processed_events; no-op if already done.
   - withOrgContext(event.org_id) + set `app.current_role='finance_worker'`.
   - Run cascade + allocate + status update in single transaction.
   - On V-FIN-WO-05 failure (outputs missing), do NOT close — schedule retry via next_retry_at exponential backoff (1m, 5m, 15m, 1h, 4h, 12h, 24h → DLQ).
   - On success, append finance_outbox_events with idempotency_key=uuidv7(), payload={wo_id, total_cost_actual, total_cost_standard, total_variance, cost_center_id, currency_id, costing_date}.
   - V-FIN-WO-08 info: if `wo_executions.completed_at < now() - 24h` and work_order_costs.status='open' on entry, write structured info-level log + audit row `wo_cost_finalize_sla_breach`.
2. Worker registration `apps/worker/src/registry.ts`: subscribe to `production.wo.completed` with at-least-once delivery.

## Files
- apps/worker/src/finance/wo-completed-handler.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/registry.ts [modify]
- apps/worker/src/finance/__tests__/wo-completed-handler.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given production.wo.completed event for WO X with all outputs registered, when worker runs, then cascade recomputed + co-products allocated + status='closed' + costing_date populated + finance.wo_cost.closed outbox row exists.
- Given same event consumed twice, when second invocation runs, then no UPDATE (idempotent).
- Given V-FIN-WO-05 fails (outputs missing), when run, then status stays 'open', no outbox, retry scheduled per exponential backoff; after 24h moves to DLQ with reason 'V-FIN-WO-05 unmet'. AND given cascade transaction fails, when handler errors, then status remains 'open', no outbox, DLQ entry category='schema'.
- Given wo_executions.completed_at > 24h before run, when handler runs, then wo_cost_finalize_sla_breach audit row written (V-FIN-WO-08 info). AND given successful close, when Prometheus scraped, then wo_cost_finalize_duration_seconds has a sample.
_(AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: wo-completed-handler.test.ts seeds WO + outputs + waste rows; exercises happy path, idempotency, V-FIN-WO-05 retry, V-FIN-WO-08 SLA breach, observability metric emission.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/worker vitest run finance/wo-completed-handler`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not close the WO costs before V-FIN-WO-05 passes (block).
- Do not emit the outbox event before the status UPDATE commits (atomic outbox).
- Do not skip the finance_worker role binding — T-010 trigger will reject any cost_per_kg writes if reached.
- Do not retry indefinitely — 24h hard limit then DLQ per §12.5 retry schedule analog.
- Do not bypass the idempotency check.
- Do not call the cascade fn synchronously from a user-facing Server Action here; this worker is the sole entry path post-completion.

pipeline_inputs.description: Worker subscriber for production.wo.completed → cascade recompute + co-product allocation + close + emit finance.wo_cost.closed outbox. V-FIN-WO-05 retry + V-FIN-WO-08 SLA warn + Prometheus metric.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single coordinator between T-016 cascade + T-017 allocation + finance_outbox_events emission. Exponential-backoff retry on V-FIN-WO-05 failure up to 24h then DLQ. Idempotent via processed_events tracking (foundation T-111). [AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost)]
